title: Integration with CI/CD Pipelines Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on automated testing in CI/CD pipelines.

questions.question: Regarding the integration of unit tests into your CI/CD pipeline, what is the primary role of Continuous Integration (CI)?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To automatically build and test your changes after every commit

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a CI-based workflow?
options: Automatically running your code's unit tests as once changes are pushed into a branch
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
